verses.arabic: وَأَقِيمُوا الصَّلَاةَ وَآتُوا الزَّكَاةَ وَارْكَعُوا مَعَ الرَّاكِعِينَ
verses.translation: And establish prayer and give zakah and bow with those who bow [in worship and obedience].

verses.arabic: فَإِذَا قَضَيْتُمُ الصَّلَاةَ فَاذْكُرُوا اللَّهَ قِيَامًا وَقُعُودًا وَعَلَىٰ جُنُوبِكُمْ
verses.translation: And when you have completed the prayer, remember Allah standing, sitting, or [lying] on your sides.

verses.arabic: إِنَّ الصَّلَاةَ تَنْهَىٰ عَنِ الْفَحْشَاءِ وَالْمُنكَرِ
verses.translation: Indeed, prayer prohibits immorality and wrongdoing.
And seek help through patience and prayer.

verses.arabic: فَوَيْلٌ لِّلْمُصَلِّينَ الَّذِينَ هُمْ عَن صَلَاتِهِمْ سَاهُونَ
verses.translation: So woe to those who pray, but are heedless of their prayer.
And those who carefully maintain their prayers.

hadith.translation: Prayer is the pillar of religion.

hadith.arabic: بَيْنَ الرَّجُلِ وَبَيْنَ الشِّرْكِ وَالْكُفْرِ تَرْكُ الصَّلاةِ
hadith.translation: Between a man and shirk (polytheism) and kufr (disbelief) is abandoning prayer.

hadith.arabic: أَوَّلُ مَا يُحَاسَبُ بِهِ الْعَبْدُ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ الصَّلاةُ
hadith.translation: The first thing for which a servant will be held accountable on the Day of Judgment is prayer.

hadith.arabic: مَنْ حَافَظَ عَلَيْهَا كَانَتْ لَهُ نُورًا وَبُرْهَانًا وَنَجَاةً يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ
hadith.translation: Whoever guards his prayer, it will be a light, proof, and salvation for him on the Day of Judgment.

hadith.arabic: الصَّلاةُ خَيْرُ مَوْضُوعٍ فَمَنْ شَاءَ أَسْتَقَلَّ وَمَنْ شَاءَ أَسْتَكْثَرَ
hadith.translation: Prayer is the best act placed before mankind, so whoever wishes may do little and whoever wishes may do much.

dhikr.arabic: سُبْحَانَ اللهِ وَبِحَمْدِهِ سُبْحَانَ اللهِ الْعَظِيمِ
dhikr.translation: Glory be to Allah and praise be to Him, Glory be to Allah the Great.

dhikr.arabic: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ
dhikr.translation: There is no god but Allah alone, with no partner.

dhikr.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَعَلَى آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
dhikr.translation: O Allah, send prayers upon Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.
